# Lemlist — Capability Profile

## Use Case Coverage

| Use Case | Rating | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| [[prospecting]] | △ | 600M+ contact database; limited prospecting-specific filter depth vs. Apollo |
| [[email-verification]] | △ | Inline verification via Lemwarm; not a dedicated verifier |
| [[email-warmup]] | ✓ | Lemwarm: 20,000+ real domains from 150+ countries; Smart plan adds industry-specific clusters and real template warm-up; DNS pre-flight check |
| [[personalisation]] | ✓ | Dynamic images (whiteboard/mug personalisation); Sendspark video thumbnails; voice cloning; AI Variables for icebreakers; AI multichannel sequence generator |
| [[campaign-sequence]] | ✓ | Native multichannel: email + LinkedIn automation + calls in one sequence; AI generates full multichannel sequence in 1 click; Lemcal native scheduling |
| [[inbox-reply-management]] | ✓ | Unified multichannel inbox (email + LinkedIn); Interest Detector for hot leads; team collaboration |

## Vendor Type
Creative multichannel outreach. Strongest for campaigns that combine email, LinkedIn, and calls with visual and video personalisation.

## Best For
Teams running account-based or high-touch outreach where standing out creatively matters. The only native platform with visual images, video personalisation, and LinkedIn + calling in one unified sequence.

## Limitations
- Per-seat pricing makes scaling expensive for larger teams (vs. Instantly/Saleshandy flat fee)
- Email accounts capped per seat (3–5 per user depending on plan)
- Warm-up network (20K domains) smaller than Instantly's 4.2M
- Database search less granular than Apollo for ICP prospecting
- AI personalisation strong but voice cloning is still developing
